name: ep-register-pro
description: A production-focused **Tampermonkey userscript** for the [European Patent Register](https://register.epo.org/) that adds a fast, data-rich right-hand sidebar for prosecution tracking.

scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/userscript_smoke.test.js && node tests/userscript_regression.test.js && node tests/userscript_lifecycle.test.js && node tests/userscript_parser_fixtures.test.js && node tests/userscript_real_fixtures.test.js && node tests/userscript_live_case_matrix.test.js && node tests/epo_codex_prototype.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_utils.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_normalized.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_doc_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_doclist_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_packet_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_status_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_posture_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_deadline_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_timeline_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_procedural_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_reference_parsers.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_territorial_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_main_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_pdf_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_upc_parser.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_document_classification.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_overview_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_territorial_signals.test.js && node tests/epo_v2_runtime_parity.test.js
